endpoints.name: Historical and Forecast Weather API
endpoints.description: Seamless access to daily and hourly historical and forecast weather data plus weather alerts, events and current conditions.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: Historical and Forecast Weather API
endpoints.description: Seamless access to daily and hourly historical and forecast weather data plus weather alerts, events and current conditions.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{STARTDATE}} with a real startdate.

endpoints.name: Historical and Forecast Weather API
endpoints.description: Seamless access to daily and hourly historical and forecast weather data plus weather alerts, events and current conditions.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{STARTDATE}} with a real startdate. Replace {{ENDDATE}} with a real enddate.

endpoints.name: Weather Forecast API
endpoints.description: Provides access to weather forecast information. The forecast is available for up to 15 days at the hourly, 12 hour and daily summary level.

endpoints.name: Retrieves hourly or daily historical weather records.
endpoints.description: The weather history data is suitable for retrieving hourly or daily historical weather records.
